## Meeting Purpose

[Introductory call between Scale Venture Partners (Max Abram) and GrowthX (Marcel Santilli) to explore potential investment opportunities.](https://fathom.video/share/DQGC2YsRavZHBXXrocydtPDULiGy1v28?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX recently closed a $12M Series A, is profitable with 74% Q4 gross margin, targeting 79% by year-end](https://fathom.video/share/DQGC2YsRavZHBXXrocydtPDULiGy1v28?tab=summary&timestamp=276.0)
  - [GrowthX's AI-driven content marketing platform automates 80% of work, leveraging top industry experts as managing directors](https://fathom.video/share/DQGC2YsRavZHBXXrocydtPDULiGy1v28?tab=summary&timestamp=318.0)
  - [Company is managing high demand, prioritizing controlled growth (2M to 20M) over rapid expansion](https://fathom.video/share/DQGC2YsRavZHBXXrocydtPDULiGy1v28?tab=summary&timestamp=558.0)
  - [Preparing for Series B round by end of year, talking to multiple VCs including Iconiq, Raylock, and Bessemer](https://fathom.video/share/DQGC2YsRavZHBXXrocydtPDULiGy1v28?tab=summary&timestamp=1063.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX's Business Model and Technology

  - [AI agent builds workflows as code with runtime, observability, and intervention layers](https://fathom.video/share/DQGC2YsRavZHBXXrocydtPDULiGy1v28?tab=summary&timestamp=318.0)
  - [Learning layer in development to improve from interactions](https://fathom.video/share/DQGC2YsRavZHBXXrocydtPDULiGy1v28?tab=summary&timestamp=345.0)
  - [Services delivered through industry experts (e.g., former TechCrunch editor-in-chief)](https://fathom.video/share/DQGC2YsRavZHBXXrocydtPDULiGy1v28?tab=summary&timestamp=358.0)
  - [Managing directors serve as product developers, client-facing roles, and oversight](https://fathom.video/share/DQGC2YsRavZHBXXrocydtPDULiGy1v28?tab=summary&timestamp=374.0)
  - [Near-zero customer acquisition costs due to reputation-based sales model](https://fathom.video/share/DQGC2YsRavZHBXXrocydtPDULiGy1v28?tab=summary&timestamp=394.0)
  - [Workflows handle 80% of work, constantly adapting and improving](https://fathom.video/share/DQGC2YsRavZHBXXrocydtPDULiGy1v28?tab=summary&timestamp=496.0)

### Product Offerings and Revenue Streams

  - [Main offerings: Content Workstream, SEO, and Custom solutions](https://fathom.video/share/DQGC2YsRavZHBXXrocydtPDULiGy1v28?tab=summary&timestamp=597.0)
  - [\~80% of revenue from Content and SEO services](https://fathom.video/share/DQGC2YsRavZHBXXrocydtPDULiGy1v28?tab=summary&timestamp=601.0)
  - [Example workflow: content strategy, creation, optimization, and ongoing management](https://fathom.video/share/DQGC2YsRavZHBXXrocydtPDULiGy1v28?tab=summary&timestamp=628.0)
  - [Replacing traditional agency spend ($2/word) with more efficient, AI-driven processes](https://fathom.video/share/DQGC2YsRavZHBXXrocydtPDULiGy1v28?tab=summary&timestamp=828.0)

### Market Positioning and Competitive Advantage

  - [Targeting $520B/year content marketing and services market](https://fathom.video/share/DQGC2YsRavZHBXXrocydtPDULiGy1v28?tab=summary&timestamp=1000.0)
  - [Displacing agency spend and augmenting internal teams](https://fathom.video/share/DQGC2YsRavZHBXXrocydtPDULiGy1v28?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
  - [Value proposition: higher quality, faster output, and cost-efficiency](https://fathom.video/share/DQGC2YsRavZHBXXrocydtPDULiGy1v28?tab=summary&timestamp=1060.0)
  - [Case studies: Ramp (increased output), Abnormal Security ($3.2M content syndication budget)](https://fathom.video/share/DQGC2YsRavZHBXXrocydtPDULiGy1v28?tab=summary&timestamp=908.0)

### Growth Strategy and Funding

  - [Controlled growth approach: $2M to $20M in revenue vs. rapid $2M to $50M](https://fathom.video/share/DQGC2YsRavZHBXXrocydtPDULiGy1v28?tab=summary&timestamp=568.0)
  - [Focusing on building strong foundation and data collection](https://fathom.video/share/DQGC2YsRavZHBXXrocydtPDULiGy1v28?tab=summary&timestamp=568.0)
  - [Preparing for Series B round by end of year](https://fathom.video/share/DQGC2YsRavZHBXXrocydtPDULiGy1v28?tab=summary&timestamp=1065.0)
  - [High interest from top-tier VCs (Iconiq, Raylock, Bessemer)](https://fathom.video/share/DQGC2YsRavZHBXXrocydtPDULiGy1v28?tab=summary&timestamp=1128.0)

### Scale VP's Investment Approach

  - [25-year-old firm focusing on business software](https://fathom.video/share/DQGC2YsRavZHBXXrocydtPDULiGy1v28?tab=summary&timestamp=122.0)
  - [Check sizes: $5M to $40M, leading rounds and taking board seats](https://fathom.video/share/DQGC2YsRavZHBXXrocydtPDULiGy1v28?tab=summary&timestamp=130.0)
  - [Recent investments in AI: Jasper (content writing), Bland (video generation), Vappy (voice bots)](https://fathom.video/share/DQGC2YsRavZHBXXrocydtPDULiGy1v28?tab=summary&timestamp=144.0)

## Next Steps

  - [No immediate follow-up planned due to misalignment in investment stage and information sharing](https://fathom.video/share/DQGC2YsRavZHBXXrocydtPDULiGy1v28?tab=summary&timestamp=1100.0)
  - [GrowthX to continue discussions with other VCs for potential Series B round](https://fathom.video/share/DQGC2YsRavZHBXXrocydtPDULiGy1v28?tab=summary&timestamp=1128.0)
  - [Scale VP to monitor GrowthX's progress for potential future opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/DQGC2YsRavZHBXXrocydtPDULiGy1v28?tab=summary&timestamp=1149.0)
